questions.question_text: In the diagram, E, F, G and H lie on the circumference of the circle centre O. $EG$ and $FH$ intersect at $J$ such that $	heta GFH = 30^{	ext{o}}$ and $	heta HJE = 110^{	ext{o}}$. Calculate:

sub_questions.question_text: Consider the following statements. (i) Most Arts students are good at debates. (ii) Some Non-Arts students are also good at debates. (a) Illustrate the information in a Venn diagram. (b) Determine from the diagram whether the following conclusions are Valid or Not Valid. (i) John is a non-Arts student so he is not good at debates. (ii) Aku is an Arts student so she is good at debates.
